headlines.title: Japan's top currency diplomat implies yen drama may not be over
Japan Intervenes After Yen Breaches 160 Against the Dollar
Japan intervenes to defend yen and warns of further action over Golden Week
Japanese yen stronger after possible intervention
Yen Rally Is at Risk of Fading Fast Without More Intervention
Japanese Yen Stronger After Possible Intervention
Asian shares gain with most markets closed for May Day, while oil holds steady at $111 a barrel

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시 헤드라인은 엔화의 급격한 변동성과 당국의 개입 소식에 집중되었습니다. 엔화는 달러 대비 160엔 선을 돌파한 후 당국의 개입으로 강세로 전환되었으며, 최고 외환 담당자는 추가 조치가 필요할 수 있음을 시사했습니다. 그러나 지속적인 개입 없이는 엔화의 반등세가 약화될 수 있다는 우려가 제기되며, 골든위크 기간 동안 추가 개입 가능성도 경고되고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese stock market headlines today are dominated by significant yen volatility and government intervention. The yen strengthened after authorities reportedly intervened following its breach of 160 against the dollar, with a top currency diplomat suggesting further action may be needed. However, the yen's rally is seen as fragile without sustained intervention, especially with warnings of potential action continuing over the Golden Week holiday.
